hero.description: Production-ready configurations for Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, OpenClaw, and more. Copy, paste, and let your AI agent work the way you want.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.browseDesc: Find configs by framework, use case, or tags. Every config is reviewed for quality.
howItWorks.copyDesc: One-click copy. Drop it into your project as CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, or any config file.
howItWorks.shareDesc: Submit your configs via GitHub PR. Free or premium — you set the price.

cta.title: Got a killer agent config?
cta.description: Share it with the community or sell it as a premium config. Your expertise, your rules, your revenue.

configs.title: Browse Configs
configs.empty: No configs match your filters. Try adjusting them.
configs.step1Desc: Click the Copy button above to copy the config to your clipboard.
configs.step2claude-code: Save as CLAUDE.md in your project root.
configs.step2cursor: Save as .cursorrules in your project root.
configs.step2openclaw: Save as AGENTS.md in your workspace directory.
configs.step2windsurf: Save as .windsurfrules in your project root.
configs.step2generic: Save as a text file in your project.
configs.step3Desc: The AI agent will now follow the rules defined in this config.

submit.title: Submit a Config
submit.description: Share your AI agent configuration with the community.

onboarding.title: First time here?
onboarding.description: uumax is a marketplace for AI agent configuration files — the files that tell tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf how to behave.

whatIs.title: What is an AI Agent Config?
whatIs.description: AI coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf use configuration files (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, etc.) to understand your coding style, project rules, and workflow. A good config turns a generic AI into your personal senior developer.
whatIs.withoutDesc: Generic responses, no context about your project, repeated mistakes
whatIs.withDesc: Knows your stack, follows your conventions, writes code your way

contributors.title: Contributors
contributors.subtitle: The people behind the configs. Want to join? Submit your config via GitHub PR.

generator.title: Config Generator
generator.subtitle: Describe your ideal AI agent and we'll generate a production-ready config for you.
generator.describePlaceholder: e.g. A React + TypeScript fullstack developer that follows clean architecture, uses Vitest for testing, and writes detailed commit messages...
generator.needApiKey: Please set your OpenRouter API key first (use the Try it button on any config page).
generator.invalidKey: Invalid API key. Please set a new one via any config's Try it button.
generator.emptyHint: Enter a description above to enable

tryIt.apiKeyDesc: Your key is stored locally and never sent to our servers.

finder.title: Config Finder
finder.hint: Tell me your tools and project, I'll find the right config.
finder.needApiKey: Please set your OpenRouter API key first. Visit any config page and click 'Try it' to set it up.

healthCheck.title: Config Health Check
healthCheck.subtitle: Paste your existing config and get an AI-powered quality review with actionable improvements.
healthCheck.placeholder: Paste your CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, or any agent config here...
healthCheck.needApiKey: Please set your OpenRouter API key first.

compare.title: Compare Configs
compare.subtitle: Pick two configurations and get an AI-powered side-by-side analysis.
compare.needApiKey: Please set your OpenRouter API key first.

remix.title: Remix Config
remix.subtitle: Fork any config and customize it with AI for your specific project.
remix.customize: How do you want to customize it?
remix.customizePlaceholder: e.g. Change from React to Vue, add Tailwind CSS rules, use pnpm instead of npm...
remix.needApiKey: Please set your OpenRouter API key first.
remix.exportHint: Same content, saved as the config file for each tool

tools.title: AI Tools
tools.subtitle: Free AI-powered tools to help you get the most out of your agent configs.
tools.setKeyHint: Set API key for unlimited use
